open_master_plans.title: Backend Drift Remediation Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Reduce the open implementation backlog by tightening backend service boundaries on the current backend path, while excluding legacy frontend-only cleanup unless a backend contract still depends on it.

entries.title: Backend Drift Remediation Master Plan
entries.goal: Reduce the open implementation backlog by tightening backend service boundaries on the current backend path, while excluding legacy frontend-only cleanup unless a backend contract still depends on it.
